key_corrections_this_session: MCP config key is mcp.servers not mcpServers
Skills are snapshot-loaded at session start, NOT lazy-loaded
Telegram allowFrom uses 'tg:ID' format, not bare integer
Onboard --auth-choice 'openrouter-api-key' workaround was never recommended (issue closed not_planned) — use manual config
'Tier 3' label is fabricated — OpenClaw doesn't use this term
memweave has NO FTS-only mode — hybrid search requires embeddings
memweave search quality is poor (0.14 scores) — may need alternative
SearXNG is official OpenClaw web search provider — Brave may not be needed
Node.js was only under root — had to install nvm for cto user
Hetzner SSH key must be uploaded via API before server creation
